critical_test_cases.bad_behavior: Merges upper-right FACTOID text into upper-left abbreviation instruction.

expected_structure.main_instruction: Draw lines between these words and their abbreviations.
expected_structure.factoid_sidebar: Earthquakes can cause rivers to temporarily flow backwards.

critical_test_cases.purpose: Verify visible-text/OCR symbol validation and semantic plausibility checking.
critical_test_cases.bad_behavior: Reads cents values as trailing-zero integers, e.g. 11¢ as 110.
critical_test_cases.expected_behavior: Detect and flag/correct cents symbols based on OCR/visual review and coin-problem semantic validation.

critical_test_cases.bad_behavior: Provides answer boxes but omits number line.
critical_test_cases.expected_behavior: Include recreated SVG or clipped number line reference.
